1.solution: k-th term: log_{‚ąö(k+1)}(k+1)¬≥ = 3/log_{(k+1)^{1/2}}(k+1) = 3/(1/2) = 6. Each term equals 6 regardless of k. Sum of n terms = 6n. Answer: C.

3.solution: log‚āÉ6 = log‚āÜx ‚Üí x = 6^{log‚āÉ6}. log‚āÉ6 = 1+log‚āÉ2 ‚Čą 1.63. Exact: x=3^{(log‚āÉ6)¬≤}. Approximating log‚āÉ6 ‚Čą 2 (since 3¬≤=9, close to 6): x ‚Čą 6¬≤=36 (satisfies x>34). Approx value ‚Čą 36.

4.solution: Let t=log‚āÉx. Series 1+(log‚āÉx)¬≤+(log‚āÉx)‚Āī+...=1/(1‚ąít¬≤) for |t|<1. Equation: (1+t)/(1‚ąít¬≤)=1/(1‚ąít)=4 ‚Üí 1‚ąít=1/4 ‚Üí t=3/4. x=3^{3/4}<4‚úď. x‚Āī=(3^{3/4})‚Āī=3¬≥=27.

5.solution: k-th term=(51‚ąík)log(x/y)‚ąí(k‚ąí1)log3. Sum k=1‚Üí100: log(x/y)√óő£(51‚ąík) ‚ąí log3√óő£(k‚ąí1). ő£(51‚ąík)=5100‚ąí5050=50. ő£(k‚ąí1)=4950. Sum=50log(x/y)‚ąí4950log3=50log(x/(3^{99}y)). Answer: C.

6.solution: 1‚ąí1/log‚āÉ6 = 1‚ąílog‚āÜ3 (change of base) = log‚āÜ6‚ąílog‚āÜ3 = log‚āÜ2. 2048=2¬Ļ¬Ļ so log‚āÜ2048=11log‚āÜ2. Equation: log‚āÜ2√óx=11log‚āÜ2 ‚Üí x=11.

8.solution: Take log‚āĀ‚āÄ: log(7/8)log6+log(8/6)log7+log(6/7)log8 = (log7‚ąílog8)log6+(log8‚ąílog6)log7+(log6‚ąílog7)log8. Each pair of cross-products: log7¬∑log6‚ąílog6¬∑log7=0; log6¬∑log8‚ąílog8¬∑log6=0; log8¬∑log7‚ąílog7¬∑log8=0. Total=0. Expression=10‚Āį=1.

9.solution: 0.25=(0.5)¬≤ so log_{0.25}t=(1/2)log_{0.5}t. Inequality: log_{0.5}(3x‚ąí5) < (1/2)log_{0.5}(3x‚ąí5). Let u=log_{0.5}(3x‚ąí5): u<u/2 ‚Üí u<0. log_{0.5}(3x‚ąí5)<0 ‚Üí (since base<1) 3x‚ąí5>1 ‚Üí x>2. Answer: A.

10.solution: Let t=log‚āāx. log_x2=1/t, log_{2x}2=1/(1+t), log_{4x}2=1/(2+t). Equation: 1/(t(1+t))=1/(2+t) ‚Üí 2+t=t+t¬≤ ‚Üí t¬≤=2 ‚Üí t=¬Ī‚ąö2 ‚Üí log_x2=1/t=¬Ī1/‚ąö2. Both 1/‚ąö2 and ‚ąí1/‚ąö2 are valid. Answer: C.
